phases.title: Hard Gate Enforcement & CLI Infrastructure

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/tasks-generate.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Pass `# AUTHORED` marker check through reconcile — do not overwrite gates that contain it.

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/ship.ts
tasks.description:
MODIFY: Add pre-flight check — scan phase deliverable files for matching `.test.ts`. If none found, exit 1 with `[BLOCKED] No test files found for <phase>`. Active immediately, no flag.

REVIEW FAIL (code): Type Safety — FR-009.
  WHERE: src/commands/ship.ts:45, 105, 108
  EXPECTED: Strict typing using TaskState and AgentBackend.
  ACTUAL: uses 'any' and implicit 'any'.
  FIX: Replace 'any' with proper types from ../utils/state.js and ../utils/config.js.
  GATE: gates/T003-gate.sh assertion #1
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > Governance & Skills Contract

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/test.ts
tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk test <feature> [--phase <N>]` — runs `pnpm vitest run` scoped to feature test file paths from tasks.json, exits 0 only if all pass.

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/ship.test.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Fix broken mock — `SlackConfigSchema` is not exported from the vi.mock of `../utils/config.js`. Fix mock, then add test for BLOCKED pre-flight.

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/server.test.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Fix EADDRINUSE — server tests must use a mock port or `vi.mock` the net binding. Real port 18794 is in use during test runs.

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description:
Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

REVIEW FAIL (code): Build failure — Done When.
  WHERE: src/commands/setup-slack.ts:164, 211, 257
  EXPECTED: fail(command: string, exitCode: number, durationS: number)
  ACTUAL: fail("setup slack", 1)
  FIX: Provide the missing durationS argument.
  GATE: gates/T008-gate.sh assertion #2
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > Done When

REVIEW FAIL (code): Build failure — Done When.
  WHERE: src/server/routes/notify.ts:71, 80
  EXPECTED: Property 'opsOnly' to exist on NotifyPayload.
  ACTUAL: Property 'opsOnly' does not exist on type 'NotifyPayload'.
  FIX: Update NotifyPayload interface in src/server/types.ts to include opsOnly: boolean (replaces masterOnly).
  GATE: gates/T008-gate.sh assertion #2
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > Done When

REVIEW FAIL (code): Missing Test File — TR-006.
  WHERE: src/commands/test-cmd.test.ts
  EXPECTED: File exists and verifies 'gwrk test' command.
  ACTUAL: File is missing.
  FIX: Implement src/commands/test-cmd.test.ts as specified in TR-006.
  GATE: gates/T008-gate.sh assertion #1
  REF: plan.md Phase 1 > Test Strategy

doneWhen: `pnpm vitest run src/utils/gate-gen.test.ts src/commands/tasks-generate.test.ts src/commands/tasks-done.test.ts src/commands/ship.test.ts src/commands/test-cmd.test.ts src/commands/server.test.ts` exits 0

tasks.title: Implement specs/001-cli-core/gap-analysis.md
tasks.description: NEW: Classify each FR-### as ✅ tested | ⚠️ weak | ❌ untested. For every ❌ or ⚠️, describe exactly what assertion is missing and what test file should contain it.

tasks.title: Implement specs/002-build-server/gap-analysis.md
tasks.description: NEW: Same classification. Focus on: server lifecycle start/stop, health endpoint, dispatch queue, Docker sandbox, git manager.

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 2
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.
